header.title: Welcome to EchoType
header.subtitle: Master English through listening, speaking, reading & writing

autoLanguageNotice.title: Interface language matched your browser
autoLanguageNotice.description: EchoType is currently using {{language}} because that matches your browser. You can change it any time in Settings.

aiSetup.title: Connect an AI model to unlock all features
aiSetup.description: EchoType needs an AI service for chat, content generation, translation, and pronunciation evaluation. Open Settings to configure your API key and model.

aiDisconnected.title: Current AI service is not connected
aiDisconnected.description: Your selected provider ({{providerId}}) does not have an API key yet, so AI features may not work.

onboarding.title: Get started in seconds
onboarding.description: Browse our built-in word books and scenario packs — or import your own content.

assessment.title: Assess your English level
assessment.description: Take a quick 15-question test to get personalized learning recommendations based on your CEFR level.
assessment.reminderDescription: You've completed 50+ sessions since your last assessment ({{level}}). Ready to check your progress?

reviewCard.title: Today's Review
reviewCard.description: Clear due review items here, separately from today's forward-learning plan below.
reviewCard.noReviewsDescription: Keep going with today's plan. Due items will appear here automatically.
reviewCard.reviewFirst: Review {{title}} first, or continue the forward-learning plan below when you want something new.

todayPlan.title: Today's Plan
todayPlan.empty: Import a word book or some content to get personalized learning tasks.
todayPlan.explanationWithLevel: Based on your {{level}} level, weak spots, and the skills you haven't practiced this week. Reviews due today appear above in Today's Review.
todayPlan.explanationWithoutLevel: Based on your recent practice, weak spots, and the skills you haven't practiced this week. Reviews due today appear above in Today's Review.

goalDialog.title: Daily Learning Goals
goalDialog.description: Set your daily targets. The plan will regenerate based on these goals.
goalDialog.balancedDescription: 4 Balanced is the default for steady listen, speak, read, and write coverage.
